name: codegrapher
description: Code intelligence for any Python project. AST indexing, call graph queries, dead code detection, impact analysis, and skill freshness validation.
author: Vishal Chandaria

commands.name: codegrapher-index
commands.description: Build or rebuild the code index for the current project

commands.name: codegrapher-query
commands.description: Query the code graph (callers, impact, dead code, deps, etc.)

commands.name: codegrapher-validate
commands.description: Check all Claude skills for stale facts

agents.name: code-explorer
agents.description: Codebase exploration agent with full index access
